channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Elon Musk calls Sam Altman a scammer while Altman accuses Musk of overselling space datacenters to investors
item.description: The exchange on X intensifies the founders' ongoing public feud.
item.content:encoded:
The exchange on X intensifies the founders' ongoing public feud.

Original source: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2075892136604573903

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/a98n0ona

  • Views: 20,950,164
  • Likes: 140,350
  • Bookmarks: 8,761
  • Quotes: 3,634
  • Replies: 13,786
  • Posts: 13

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Elon Musk
  • Miles Brundage
  • Gary Marcus
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
Grab your popcorn friends, its starting all over again. Sam vs. Elon: round 2

item.title: Apple files lawsuit against Chief Hardware Officer Tang Tan alleging trade-secret theft before joining Jony Ive's OpenAI-acquired startup
item.description: The suit claims Tan exfiltrated sensitive supplier data and internal documents.
item.content:encoded:
The suit claims Tan exfiltrated sensitive supplier data and internal documents.

Original source: https://theinformation.com/articles/apple-sues-openai-trade-secret-theft

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/x3wyd8wk

  • Views: 5,243,878
  • Likes: 29,667
  • Bookmarks: 2,392
  • Quotes: 158
  • Replies: 1,476
  • Posts: 15

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Susan Zhang
  • Martin Shkreli
  • Brendan O'Donoghue
Major allegations about an Apple employee who joined OpenAI in Jan 2026, kept a laptop, found an exploit in Apple's systems and stole files over a multi-week time. This is similar to what Anthony Levandowski was accused of doing by Google back in 2018

item.title: 1X executive Dar Sleeper criticizes WIRED for focus on sexualization and freaky fingers in robotics coverage
item.description: Other tech founders and investors advised against cooperating with the publication.
item.content:encoded:
Other tech founders and investors advised against cooperating with the publication.

Original source: https://www.wired.com/story/the-1x-neo-robot-has-freaky-fast-fingers/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/tw34cn94

  • Views: 225,163
  • Likes: 1,491
  • Bookmarks: 115
  • Quotes: 10
  • Replies: 120
  • Posts: 14

Top authors

  • Brian Armstrong
  • Mike Solana
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Packy McCormick
  • Justine Moore
why is anyone in tech still talking to WIRED in 2026

item.title: Sam Altman claims a 5.6 sol AI model leads global benchmarks, pointing to Elon Musk's obsession as proof
item.description: The playful jab highlights the intensifying rivalry between OpenAI and xAI.
item.content:encoded:
The playful jab highlights the intensifying rivalry between OpenAI and xAI.

Original source: https://x.com/sama/status/2075983427019612242

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/287qi3ok

  • Views: 2,787,189
  • Likes: 44,585
  • Bookmarks: 2,465
  • Quotes: 968
  • Replies: 3,145
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Denny Zhou
  • kache
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
  • Chubby♨️
Dang. Sam strikes back.

item.title: Thinking Machines argues cooperative human-AI systems are superior to full automation
item.description: The 18-month-old startup focuses on deep model customization and collaboration tools.
item.content:encoded:
The 18-month-old startup focuses on deep model customization and collaboration tools.

Original source: https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/the-future-worth-building-is-human/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/38hvhjiw

  • Views: 33,123
  • Likes: 370
  • Bookmarks: 133
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 44
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Sriram Krishnan
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • elvis
  • Pedro Domingos
  • Sarah Wang
Highly-recommended read. The whole "AI replacing humans" narrative is a complete scam. What Thinking Machines shares here is closer to the original goal of AI: to augment and empower humanity.

item.title: Lux Capital co-founder Josh Wolfe argues Ghost Font visual cortex illusions show human biological advantages over machine intelligence
item.description: Policy researcher Henry Shevlin noted the font appeared entirely blank.
item.content:encoded:
Policy researcher Henry Shevlin noted the font appeared entirely blank.

Original source: https://x.com/ericlu/status/2075876651574210643

  • Likes: 1,664
  • Bookmarks: 432
  • Quotes: 10
  • Replies: 79
  • Posts: 9

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Josh Wolfe
  • Chris Albon
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Jeff Huber
Every captcha next week is like

item.title: OpenAI Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux claims his productivity spiked after using the ChatGPT desktop app for one day
item.description: He shared a chart showing progress exceeding his previous two weeks.
item.content:encoded:
He shared a chart showing progress exceeding his previous two weeks.

Original source: https://chatgpt.com/download/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nhgi0ede

  • Views: 1,197,588
  • Likes: 4,683
  • Bookmarks: 261
  • Quotes: 50
  • Replies: 614
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Yu Bai
  • Tibo
  • Romain Huet
  • Lisan al Gaib
whoa

item.title: Rohan Paul and Garry Tan agree high-end AI model costs will drop fourfold within six months
item.description: They also predict localized Opus-grade models within a year from-now twelvemonth
item.content:encoded:
They also predict localized Opus-grade models within a year from-now twelvemonth

Original source: https://hai.stanford.edu/ai-index/2025-ai-index-report

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/uang728j

  • Views: 312,369
  • Likes: 2,140
  • Bookmarks: 438
  • Quotes: 6
  • Replies: 90
  • Posts: 6

Top authors

  • Garry Tan
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • elvis
  • Rohan Paul
  • Tim Shi
100% agree. That famous Stanford report already found GPT-3.5-level inference costs has already fallen 280X in under 2 years. And so we will see Jevons paradox for intelligence: cheaper inference will create far more demand. Multi-agent systems will be everywhere when we have Opus 4.8 class open-source model at 4X cheaper prices.

item.title: Sam Altman questions cost breakdown showing AI tool Fable accounted for 30% of team infrastructure spend
item.description: The debate started after a team tracked its first week deploying Sol and Fable.
item.content:encoded:
The debate started after a team tracked its first week deploying Sol and Fable.

Original source: https://x.com/thdxr/status/2075963734745342361

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/5m9m40eq

  • Views: 1,399,913
  • Likes: 8,861
  • Bookmarks: 814
  • Quotes: 57
  • Replies: 389
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • kache
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
  • Jerry Liu
Do you pretty please mind making it so Codex is able to select its own model and reasoning instead of spinning up multiple subagents that are using sol on Max or High or 5.5 xHigh for simple exploring? It is wasting a LOT of my usage and actually comes out costing MORE than Fable 5...

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 AI model family beats human physicians in a blind clinical evaluation of health responses
item.description: The smallest variant, Luna, outperforms GPT-5.5 at 25x lower cost
item.content:encoded:
The smallest variant, Luna, outperforms GPT-5.5 at 25x lower cost

Original source: https://x.com/thekaransinghal/status/2075689779937833302

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/21w9gd7m

  • Views: 899,801
  • Likes: 4,182
  • Bookmarks: 462
  • Quotes: 53
  • Replies: 336
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Boris Power
  • Eric Topol
  • Reiichiro Nakano
I’m very proud of how small the gap is between our free and paid models at healthcare!
